headline: Monitor Claude Code Activity in Real-Time
lede: Transform your terminal into a command center for your AI assistant. This plugin parses your session streams to visualize token usage and subagent progress without breaking your workflow.

headline: Standardize AI Coding Workflows with Superpowers
lede: Engineering discipline meets autonomous execution. By enforcing structured brainstorming and iterative TDD protocols, this framework bridges the gap between simple chat-based generation and reliable, professional software development.

headline: Accelerate Local AI Training with Unsloth
lede: Optimized Triton kernels drive this platform’s capability to slash VRAM consumption during model fine-tuning. Achieve professional-grade performance on consumer hardware through efficient data handling and minimized overhead.

headline: Newton Scales Differentiable Physics Simulations
lede: Flowing data through massive parallelization, this engine supports high-fidelity robotics and agent training. It provides a standardized, extensible architecture designed for seamless integration into modern machine learning pipelines.

headline: Reverse Engineering the PlayStation 4 Architecture
lede: A focused, C++ implementation of system-level emulation. By precisely reconstructing internal hardware libraries, the project successfully bridges the gap between console firmware and modern desktop silicon.

headline: Orchestrate Autonomous Agents in Secure Sandboxes
lede: Engineering teams require more than just code generation; they need safe, production-ready infrastructure. Open SWE provides the modular blueprint to deploy isolated, cloud-based agents capable of managing real-world software development tasks.

headline: Superpowers Crosses 95,000 Milestone
lede: The demand for structured, agent-led engineering is surging. This rapid adoption signifies a fundamental shift in how developers integrate autonomous tools into their daily development lifecycle.

headline: Testing Early-Stage Console Emulation
lede: A raw, iterative look at PS4 software preservation. This project invites developers to contribute to the complex process of mapping system calls and stabilizing performance in experimental environments.

headline: Compiling Standards for Physics Simulations
lede: Drawing from the expertise of industry leaders, this project serves as a cornerstone for simulation research. It aggregates high-fidelity modeling techniques, offering a scholarly reference point for the future of robotic training environments.

headline: Isolation-First AI Task Execution
lede: Protect your production environment by containing agent actions within isolated sandboxes. This framework ensures that autonomous code generation respects internal conventions while maintaining strict boundaries around system access.
